Sub-agent analysis confirms parameter drift (Item 3 a=0.42, Item 5 a>1.5), risking score inaccuracy and assessment invalidity.", "recommended_fix": "Implement `calibrate_parameters()` using real pilot data (min 300 responses) or high-fidelity synthetic data. Integrate checks for sample size, missing data, and aberrant responses. Automate re-calibration on new data batches."}, {"severity": "HIGH", "file_or_area": "`calibrate_parameters()` function", "issue": "Function lacks input validation: no checks for minimum sample size, missing data, or aberrant response patterns, increasing risk of model overfitting or collapse.", "recommended_fix": "Add validation: enforce N≥300, <10% missing per item, no straight-lining or random patterns. Use IRT-specific fit statistics (S-X2, INFIT/OUTFIT)."}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": "This undermines the scientific foundation of AURA scoring. Uncalibrated IRT invalidates competency claims, exposing VOLAURA to legal and reputational risk under ISO 10667-2.", "next_files_to_read": ["packages/assessment/scoring/irt.py", "scripts/calibrate_parameters.py", "docs/adr/ADR-004-assessment-engine.md"]}

findings.issue: IRT parameters (a, b, c) are hardcoded (a=1.5, b=0.0, c=0.25) and not calibrated from real or synthetic data, violating psychometric validity. Sub-agent analysis confirms parameter drift (Item 3 a=0.42, Item 5 a>1.5), risking score inaccuracy and assessment invalidity.
findings.recommended_fix: Implement `calibrate_parameters()` using real pilot data (min 300 responses) or high-fidelity synthetic data. Integrate checks for sample size, missing data, and aberrant responses. Automate re-calibration on new data batches.

findings.issue: Function lacks input validation: no checks for minimum sample size, missing data, or aberrant response patterns, increasing risk of model overfitting or collapse.
findings.recommended_fix: Add validation: enforce N≥300, <10% missing per item, no straight-lining or random patterns. Use IRT-specific fit statistics (S-X2, INFIT/OUTFIT).

whistleblower_flag: This undermines the scientific foundation of AURA scoring. Uncalibrated IRT invalidates competency claims, exposing VOLAURA to legal and reputational risk under ISO 10667-2.
